property.name: targetObject
property.label: Target Object API Name
property.description: DLO/DMO API name to aggregate (e.g., ssot__SalesOrder__dlm).

property.name: sourceField
property.label: Source Field (CRM Record)
property.description: Field on this record whose value links to Data Cloud (e.g., Id).

property.name: targetField
property.label: Target Field (Data Cloud)
property.description: Field on the Data Cloud record that matches the source value (e.g., ssot__AccountId__c).

property.name: groupByField
property.label: Group By Field
property.description: Field to group by — becomes the chart axis labels or pie slices (e.g., ssot__Stage__c).

property.name: aggregateFunction
property.label: Aggregate Function
property.description: Aggregate function to apply to the Aggregate Field.

property.name: aggregateField
property.label: Aggregate Field
property.description: Numeric field to aggregate (e.g., ssot__TotalAmount__c). Not required for COUNT.

property.name: sortBy
property.label: Sort By
property.description: Sort by the aggregate value (e.g. highest SUM first) or alphabetically by the Group By field.

property.name: sortDirection
property.label: Sort Direction
property.description: ASC or DESC. When Sort By is 'aggregate', DESC shows the largest values first. When Sort By is 'groupBy', ASC is alphabetical A→Z.

property.name: groupByTrunc
property.label: Group By Truncation
property.description: Date/datetime fields only. Buckets values by the selected interval — e.g., 'month' groups all records from the same calendar month. Ignored if the group-by field is not a date or datetime type.

property.name: stackByField
property.label: Stack By Field
property.description: Optional second GROUP BY field for stacked or grouped bar charts. Each distinct value becomes a color segment. Works with verticalBar and horizontalBar chart types.

property.name: stackMode
property.label: Stack Mode
property.description: When Stack By Field is set: 'stacked' stacks segments on the same bar; 'grouped' places them side by side.

property.name: maxGroups
property.label: Max Groups
property.description: Maximum number of groups returned (1–100). Default 25. Fewer groups improves readability; increase only when the group-by field has many distinct values you need to show.

property.name: showLegend
property.label: Show Legend
property.description: Show or hide the chart legend. Defaults to on for pie, donut, and stacked charts; off for bar and line.

property.name: chartHeight
property.label: Chart Height (px)
property.description: Canvas height in pixels (100–1000). Default 300. Increase for charts with many groups that need more vertical space.

property.name: filters
property.label: Filters (Optional)
property.description: Extra WHERE conditions. Format: fieldApiName|operator|value, comma-separated. Operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, like, in, notnull, isnull. Use {FieldName} to reference the current record's field value. Example: ssot__Stage__c|eq|Closed Won, ssot__Amount__c|gte|1000, ssot__CloseDate__c|gte|{CloseDate}
